title: Mixed conditionals
explanation:
Mixed conditionals

Mixed conditionals combine different times in the if-clause and result clause.

  • Past condition + present result: If I had studied medicine, I would be a doctor now.
  • Present condition + past result: If he were more organised, he would not have missed the deadline.

questions.text: If I [*had taken|took|would take] that job, I would live abroad now.
questions.feedback: Past unreal condition with present result.

questions.text: If she [*were|was|had been] more confident, she would have applied for the role.
questions.feedback: Present unreal condition with past result.

questions.text: If we [*had booked|booked|would book] earlier, we would not be paying so much now.
He would not have failed if he [*were|had been|was] more careful in general.
questions.feedback: General present characteristic affects a past result.

questions.text: If they [*had listened|listened|would listen] to the forecast, they would be at home now.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: If I had not moved to Madrid, I ____ Spanish now. | *would not speak | did not speak | would not have spoken
If he were less impatient, he ____ so many mistakes yesterday. | *would not have made | would not make | did not make
If she had accepted the offer, she ____ in Berlin now. | *would be living | will live | lived
If we were better prepared, we ____ the presentation last week. | *would have enjoyed | enjoyed | would enjoy
questions.feedback: Present condition affecting a past result.

questions.text: If I [*had saved|saved|would save] more money, I could afford that course now.
She would not have said that if she [*were|had been|is] more diplomatic.
If they [*had not missed|missed|would miss] the train, they would be here by now.
questions.feedback: Past missed train causes current absence.

questions.text: If he [*were|had been|was] more ambitious, he would have gone for the promotion.
We would be less stressed now if we [*had started|started|would start] earlier.
